mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EDITOR_TABLE (userno, editortitle, editorcontent, thumbnailurl, contentimgurl) VALUES (#{userno}, #{editortitle}, #{editorcontent}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{contentImgUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM EDITOR_TABLE ORDER BY editorno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE EDITOR_TABLE SET editortitle = #{editortitle}, editorcontent = #{editorcontent}, thumbnailurl = #{thumbnailUrl}, contentimgurl = #{contentImgUrl}, editorupdatedate = sysdate WHERE editorno = #{editorno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM EDITOR_TABLE WHERE editortitle LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' ORDER BY editorno DESC
